metadata.description: Agent-safety and industrial-engineering plugins for Claude Code.

plugins.name: erp-report-engine
plugins.description: A provably read-only SQL layer for AI agents over the database behind an ERP (Logo Tiger, Netsis, Mikro) - a guarded MCP server, safe-query skills, and zero-setup /trust-benchmark and /erp-schema commands.

plugins.name: industrial-engineering-ai-skills
plugins.description: An operations-analysis method pack: OTIF audits, forecast-accuracy reviews, ABC-XYZ, safety-stock, Pareto and reporting contracts - with role agents and always-on data-hygiene rules.
